title: PutPipelineScheduleRequest
description: PUT /api/pipelines/:id/schedule body. Creates the pipeline's schedule if none exists, or replaces the existing one (a pipeline has at most one schedule). `enabled` is optional -- spray-json omits `None` on the wire, and the service normalizes an absent value to `true`. `kind: "cron"` expects a standard 5-field cron expression; `kind: "interval"` expects a `<n><unit>` token (unit one of s/m/h/d).
